Slack.NoOauthTokenAdded: Please add your Slack OAuth Token %1$shere%2$s.
Slack.OauthTokenRequiredErrorMessage: To enable Slack, provide your Slack OAuth Token in General settings > Slack.
Slack.OauthTokenSettingDescription: Enter your Slack OAuth Token generated from your Slack. %1$sLearn more%2$s.
Slack.SlackChannelIdRequiredErrorMessage: Slack Channel ID cannot be empty.
Slack.SlackChannelIdInvalidErrorMessage: Invalid Slack Channel ID, only alphanumeric values are allowed.
Slack.SlackEnterYourSlackChannelIdHelpText: Enter the Slack Channel ID of the channel that will receive these reports. To find the ID, go to Slack and open the channel details > About tab. %1$sLearn more%2$s
Slack.SlackAlertContent: %1$s has been triggered for website %2$s as the metric %3$s in report %4$s %5$s.
